data_sources.label: Bureau / CIBIL MSME Rank
data_sources.integration: IDBI's existing bureau subscription (live pull, already operational)

data_sources.label: GST returns (GSTR-1/3B via GSP/AA)
data_sources.integration: GSP API or AA-based GST consent

data_sources.label: NACH / cheque bounce (core banking)
data_sources.integration: Core banking's own database -- nightly batch (read-replica or CSV/SFTP export)

data_sources.label: UPI transaction behaviour
data_sources.integration: AA consent, added once a borrower completes onboarding -- coverage still maturing

data_sources.label: EPFO contributions
data_sources.integration: EPFO employer portal API -- bespoke tie-up; structurally absent (not just thin) for MSMEs with no registered employees

data_sources.label: Utility payment history
data_sources.integration: No mature, interoperable aggregator in India today -- would need a bespoke state electricity board tie-up
